app.title: Module Federation remote
app.descriptionPre: This is a standalone Svelte app. The components below are exposed over Module Federation and loaded at runtime by the React host — the exact same code, served from this app's

springToy.label: live svelte component
springToy.hint: Swing the Svelte ticket onto the far React host to mount it — it docks inside React and stays. Give it a firm tug to pull it back out (unmount).
